title: Aryna Sabalenka Wins Tennis Match in Miami
summary: Aryna Sabalenka is a top tennis player who won her match in the Miami Open. She beat Caty McNally with scores of 6-4 and 6-2. Sabalenka is trying to win both the Indian Wells and Miami tournaments this year, which is called the 'Sunshine Double'. She has won eight matches in a row. Next, she will play against Zheng Qinwen from China. Other players like Elena Rybakina and Jessica Pegula also won their matches. The article talks about who is winning in the Miami Open tennis tournament.

background_read: The Miami Open is a big tennis tournament held in Florida, USA. Top players from around the world compete to win. Aryna Sabalenka is a famous tennis player from Belarus who is currently ranked number one. She won the Indian Wells tournament earlier this month. The 'Sunshine Double' is a special achievement in tennis when a player wins both Indian Wells and Miami in the same year. This article updates fans on who is winning matches in the Miami Open.
